steel_barrel.title: Upgrade your Create Big Cannons barrel to Steel (requires TFMG steel ingots)

mortar.title: Set up a mortar position using Create Big Cannons for vertical arc fire

subtitle.text: The biggest cannon that doesn't require Nethersteel.

description: Steel Barrel is the penultimate cannon tier.
Above Cast Iron. Below Nethersteel (which requires the End).
For now: this is the ceiling.
Big Cartridge is a larger powder charge — more power, more recoil.
Mortar Stone fires in high arc trajectories.
A mortar position covers terrain that a direct-fire cannon cannot.
You are building the most capable weapon available
This is the correct order of operations.
→ Set up a mortar position for arc fire [check]
